English:
I am
You are

Preterite Tense (completed single event)
I was
You were
He/She was
We were
They were

Imperfect Tense (ongoing actions/habits)
I was going/was
You were going/were
He/She was going/was
We were going/were
They were going/were

Future tense
I will be
You will be
He/She will be
We will be
They will be

Conditional tense
I would be
You would be
He/She would be
We would be
They would be
Spanish:

Sería (use pronoun)
Estaríamos
